Introduction to Toolkit

Toolkit is a dual-interface utility API that exposes common LLM-workflow primitives over both HTTP and the Model Context Protocol. This fixture exists so conversion tests have a predictable input shape.

Features

  • Document conversion (PDF, DOCX, HTML, and more)
  • Context-aware text chunking
  • PII sanitization via Microsoft Presidio
  • Structured extraction with automatic schema retries

Example table

CategoryPrimary tool
Conversionconvert_file
Chunkingchunk_semantic
Sanitizationsanitize_text
Structuredextract_structured

The test expects at least the title heading, one list item, and one table row to survive the round-trip through any conversion engine.
